settings.alt_txt: Woman wearing a handcrafted cognac leather cat backpack
settings.text_content: More than an accessory, The Bastet Backpack is a celebration of personality and craftsmanship. Inspired by the graceful silhouette of a cat, each piece is handcrafted using carefully selected full-grain leather and finished by handBuilt to accompany you for years, it develops a unique patina that tells your story with every journey.
